_comment: Verified fact base for the JD tailoring pipeline (packages/core/src/tailor/). The tailor may ONLY use keywords/claims present here — it must never invent experience. Keep this in sync with resume.tex + LinkedIn; `pnpm sync` re-baselines the drift hashes and `pnpm status` warns when sources drift.
seniority: early-career (graduating Aug 2026); ~1-2 yrs applied experience across AI eng + full-stack

experience.role: AI Engineer (Agent Orchestration, Memory, RAG & Systems)
highlights: Built the flagship Daily Brief agent (Python/FastAPI) — an agentic orchestration loop over Email, Calendar, and Exa AI web-search tools via asyncio.
Architected a multi-tier memory system (working/medium/long-term) on MongoDB and Redis.
Built an LLM evaluation pipeline with promptfoo benchmarking 8+ models (Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, Grok) on tool-calling, memory, and latency.
Cut routing-LLM token usage by 82% via artifact-based prompting and context deduplication.
Implemented Langfuse observability for LLM traces, latency, and cost.
Worked on CASA security standards: Redis token denylists and injection sanitization.
Developed CircuitSynth, fine-tuning Qwen 4B/8B with LoRA/QLoRA to generate executable Arduino circuit JSONs.
Achieved 75% accuracy (vs ~0% for base GPT models) via a multi-stage RAG pipeline with automated validation.
Ran quantized GGUF models on Raspberry Pi for edge deployment.

projects.name: Samagra (Indigle)
highlights: Full-stack campus ERP platform grown to 10,000+ active users.
React Native mobile client, Node.js/Express REST API, MongoDB, Next.js web app.
JWT auth with RBAC, rate limiting, Socket.io real-time sync, 99.9% uptime.
Zero-cost Vercel-hosted backend handling 150k+ monthly API requests at sub-100ms latency.

projects.name: Open Source
highlights: mastra-ai/mastra (25k+ stars): 12 merged PRs across core agent runtime, streaming, ai-sdk, and Studio.
cal.com (46k+ stars): full BigBlueButton video integration — 912 LOC, 32 unit tests.
n8n (195k+ stars): Webhook CSP security fix and a cross-platform build-path fix.

projects.name: EmailPartner
highlights: Turns incoming Gmail into live AI cards via Gmail watch → Pub/Sub → durable worker queue → Gemini.

projects.name: Web-Aware RAG Engine
highlights: Async web ingestion + semantic search with load-balanced FastAPI replicas and a Next.js 15 frontend.

projects.name: IntelliCommerce
highlights: Intent-routing e-commerce chatbot across microservices with Pinecone-backed RAG.

headline_metrics: 12 merged PRs into Mastra's agent runtime (25k+ stars)
scaled a campus platform to 10,000+ users
150k+ monthly API requests at sub-100ms latency
